subcodes.first_line: O three brothers, three spiritual luminous youths! It is said that the soaring celestial eagle consisteth of three stars [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سه برادر سه سراج جوان روحانی گویند که نسر طائر آسمانی عبارت از سه کوکب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @love of God
